role: Westgate outer-road/offramp entrance into Blacklight Kids nightlife district.
district_connection: Blacklight Kids / night market / club district

road_collision_mask.white: drivable / walkable road, dry parking, sidewalks, entry pavement
road_collision_mask.black: blocked walls, buildings, curbs, water/rock edge, outside-road zones

overlay_asset_collision_mask.white: overlay prop blocks, if using prop-level blockers

phaser_notes: Dry parking spots must remain open so Donny's van can park there.
Use parking override rectangles over dry parking spaces and drive aisles if thin mask lines snag the van.
Painted parking stall lines do not block the van.
The Westgate Night Market sign is preserved as a separate asset and should be placed on the map during scene setup.
Overlay assets are decorative unless paired with the overlay asset collision mask or custom blockers.
Use invisible Red Concord detection cones later for cameras, gate posts, and patrol scan zones.
After parking, the next Westgate/Blacklight Kids district chunks become walk-only.
suggested_layer_order: road decals already baked into base
separate sign asset if placed independently
